## Overview

This is the first article in the sample documentation.

### Subheading

More content here to test the Table of Contents.

{% callout "important" %}
This is an important callout to grab the user's attention.
{% endcallout %}

{% disclosure "What are basic documents?" %}
There are two basic types of documents you can create in DZDocs: word processing documents and page layout documents. Which document type you choose depends on what you want to create.
{% enddisclosure %}

{% disclosure "How to tell which kind of document you're viewing" %}
To see whether a template or document is set up for word processing or page layout, open it. Click the document icon in the toolbar and see if the Document Body tickbox is selected.
{% enddisclosure %}
